sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_vector ARRAY, label STRING);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data_vector, label) VALUES (1, ARRAY[100, 200, 300, 400], 'A'), (2, ARRAY[500, 100, 600, 250], 'B'), (3, ARRAY[700, 150, 300, 650], 'C');
SELECT id, gvector_digit_sort(data_vector, 2, 0, TRUE) FROM test_table WHERE label NOT LIKE 'B%';
SELECT id, gvector_digit_sort(data_vector, 2, 1, FALSE) FROM test_table WHERE NOT (label LIKE 'C%') ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE another_table (group_id INT, sort_key INT, description STRING);
INSERT INTO another_table (group_id, sort_key, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'x'), (1, 2, 'y'), (2, 1, 'z'), (2, 3, 'w');
SELECT group_id, gvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT sort_key FROM another_table WHERE group_id = 1), 1, 0, TRUE) FROM another_table GROUP BY group_id HAVING group_id NOT LIKE '2%';
SELECT id, gvector_digit_sort(data_vector, 4, 0, TRUE) FROM test_table WHERE data_vector[0] NOT LIKE '400%';

SELECT group_id, gvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT sort_key FROM another_table), 1, 0, FALSE) AS sorted_keys FROM another_table WHERE group_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM another_table WHERE description NOT LIKE 'w%') GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT id, gvector_digit_sort(NULLIF(data_vector, ARRAY[]), 2, 1, TRUE) FROM test_table WHERE label NOT LIKE 'A%';
SELECT gvector_digit_sort(data_vector, 2, 0, TRUE) FROM test_table ORDER BY (CASE WHEN label NOT LIKE 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END);
